items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – TikTok / Facebook Video Presenter (Manchester)

We’re looking for confident, natural on-camera presenters / actors to feature in short-form, social media-style videos, filmed on set in Manchester.

This is not traditional acting — we want people who feel comfortable talking directly to camera in a TikTok / Facebook Reels style. Think engaging, relatable, confident, and modern.

🔹 The Role

Present short, punchy scripts straight to camera

TikTok / Facebook-style delivery (15–60 seconds)

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

sharedPost.text:
Acting is Not the Jobs

I wrote this monologue for the actors in my weekly workshop in Ryde. 

But really, it’s for every actor who’s ever sat in their car after class thinking, “Why do I do this?”

It’s for the ones juggling shifts and self-tapes.  
For the ones who haven’t booked in a year but still turn up on Tuesday nights.  
For the drama students wondering if the industry even wants them.

Acting isn’t just the jobs. The jobs are rare.  
Acting is finding yourself in yourself.  
It’s finding yourself in others.  
It’s the reminder that you’re not mad — there are other humans on this earth just as obsessed with telling stories as you are.

If you need that reminder today, this one’s for you.

#Acting #ActorsLife #Theatre #DramaSchool #ActorsCommunity #UKTheatre #IsleOfWight #VentnorFringe
#Acting #ActorsLife #Theatre #UKActors

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – PSYCHOLOGICAL HORROR FILM “PUPPET”

Hi everyone,

I’m a London-based filmmaker currently directing a psychological horror film titled “Puppet”, alongside my co-producer and writer.

We’ve recently launched our crowdfunding campaign and have already raised £231, and we’re now moving into casting and pre-production.

ABOUT THE FILM:

“Puppet” is a psychological horror that explores perception, hallucinations, and the breakdown of reality. The story follows a young woman whose mental state begins to deteriorate as she experiences disturbing visions and a growing loss of control over her mind and surroundings and soul.

The film focuses on atmosphere, realism, and emotional intensity rather than relying solely on jump scares.

ROLES AVAILABLE:

• Lead (Female, 16-25)
A psychologically intense role requiring strong emotional range : fear, confusion, vulnerability, and distress. Needs to have a good scream, and a good blank stare

• Second Lead (Female, 16-25)
A character that involves duality, at first free spirited and kind, a cool mature, aesthetic teen vibe, and later in the film, a creepy and intense presence, this role requires emotional range : anger, sadistic and manic nature, and just overall intensity 

• Supporting - Girlfriend (Female, 16-25)
A grounded and caring presence, emotionally connected to the lead.

• Supporting - Father / Authority Figure (Male, 25+)
Calm, observant, detached and distant. Adds realism and tension.
   
• Supporting - The boss
(Female 20+)
Has a few lines, talkative yet authoritative. 

(Open to all ethnicities)

ADDITIONAL / SUPPORTING ROLES:

We are also looking for people to take part in smaller or background roles, including:

• Friends / party guests
• Dead mother 
• Background characters
• Office workers
• Doctors/ nurses 
• Passersby (street scenes)

These roles are less demanding but still important in building a realistic world for the film.

DETAILS:

• Location: London
• Filming: Outside school/work hours
• Duration: Approx. 1–2 weeks
• Project type: Independent / student-led
• Unpaid (food + travel covered where possible)
• Great opportunity for experience, showreel material, and credits

The filming time will be split to specific days that are spread out throughout the month of filming to give enough time for editing and assessment as well as enough breathing room to fit everyone’s schedule. 

AUDITIONS:

Auditions will be held via self-tape or in person.

If interested, please message with:

• Name
• Age
• Location
• Any acting experience (not required)
• A recent photo/headshot
You can DM or email me here; 
Ifeafammbonu@gmail.com

We’re really excited to start bringing this project to life and to collaborate with passionate and creative people 🤍

The filming time will be split to specific days that are spread out throughout the month of filming to give enough time for editing and assessment as well as enough breathing room to fit everyone’s schedule. 

AUDITIONS:

Auditions will be held via self-tape or in person.

If interested, please message with:

• Name
• Age
• Location
• Any acting experience (not required)
• A recent photo/headshot
You can DM or email me here; 
Ifeafammbonu@gmail.com

We’re really excited to start bringing this project to life and to collaborate with passionate and creative people 🤍

​Na plan nowego serialu poszukujemy statysty, który wcieli się w rolę młodego policjanta. 
Scenę gramy w malowniczym Milanówku!

​📅 TERMIN: 21 kwietnia
📍 MIEJSCE: Milanówek - dojazd we własnym zakresie (dobry dojazd WKD!)
💰 STAWKA: 120 zł (płatne po planie)

​Kogo szukamy?
​Młodego mężczyzny o aparycji policjanta (atutem będzie krótka, schludna fryzura).
​
​Jak się zgłosić?
​Wyślij SMS pod numer: 731 738 797
​W treści wpisz:
​Imię i nazwisko
​Wiek
​Miejscowość zamieszkania
​
​📸 Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

items.text:
Hi, I’m Valeria — actress and model based in London.
Age: 30 · Height: 5’7” · Weight: 143 lbs
Hair: Brown · Eyes: Blue
Languages: Russian, Ukrainian, English, German
I’m an actress and model with professional drama and on-camera training, available for film, TV, and commercial projects — including student films and independent productions.
I’m right for roles that call for:
magnetic and emotionally charged · femme fatale and passionate leads · high-status women with underlying vulnerability
Professional, driven, and easy to collaborate with. Available for UK-based and international projects. Ready to travel and self-tape.
If you’re a casting director, producer, or an actor — feel free to reach out. I’d love to connect.
I’m here to bring something real to every project I’m part of.
📎 Photos attached · Showreel available at the link below

https://www.instagram.com/reel/DJox_phIze8/?igsh=NzZnbXJlMHNrbTcx

items.text:
Hello everyone 🙂

CASTING CALL BLACK, ASIAN OR MIXED ACTRESS (VOICE OVER ROLE FOR VIDEO GAME)

I am currently casting for a narrative-driven VR project at Escape Studios titled Heavy is the Crown, and I am looking for a voice actress to portray the lead role of Lenore Vespen.

Lenore is a complex, emotionally layered character, and the performance is voice-over led, with a strong focus on internal monologue, subtlety, and psychological depth.

For this role, we are specifically seeking a Black, Asian or mixed-race actress, as the character is of African and Asian heritage.

I would love to invite any actress interested to submit a self-tape for the role. Please find attached the casting brief, which includes full details of the project and a monologue for audition.

This is a student industry project with a £100 honorarium, offering a strong, narrative-focused piece for showreel, as well as collaboration within a semi-professional production environment.

Self-tape deadline is set on April 30th and the recording session will take place on the week starting May 4th, the day will be set at the actress's convenience.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions—I’d be very happy to provide further information.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Don’t hesitate to share to any actress you think might fit the role I would really appreciate it,

Thanks,

Mary-Jane
Director

items.text:
A Student Film

*Meet THE MANDELAS*
A 90s-style comedy about a family, a girlfriend, and a secret that won't stay hidden. In a world of new beginnings, Thabo is looking for a way out, the Reverend is looking for the truth, and Lerato is just looking for a nice dinner.

Dinner is served. Confession is mandatory. 

We’re looking for: 
Young Male (20s)
Young Woman (20s)
Older Man (40+)
Older Woman (30+)

Able to speak Xhosa

For more information. Contacts are on the poster🙏

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – ETIUDA STUDENCKA 🎬
Poszukujemy statystów do scen sportowych w etiudzie studenckiej Szkoły Filmowej w Łodzi!

🎭 FIZJOTERAPEUCI 

(5–10 osób)

– wiek: 25–40 lat

– dobrze zbudowani, sportowa sylwetka

– wygląd raczej „niewyróżniający się”, naturalny

– wcielają się w sztab treningowy zawodniczki

– miejsce akcji: sala treningowa

🎭 SKOCZKOWIE

(2 osoby)– wiek: ok. 20 lat

– młodzi mężczyźni, podobni do siebie wyglądem

– szczupła, atletyczna budowa ciała

– mile widziana inna narodowość / karnacja skóry

– role statystyczne (para zawodników z innego kraju)

– miejsce akcji: pokój testowy

📅 Termin zdjęć: 12.05 - 15.05

📍 Lokalizacja: Łódź

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na: p.malasiewicz@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

W temacie: imię i nazwisko + hasło: SPORT 

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka).

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

Zapraszamy! 🎥✨

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – ETIUDA STUDENCKA 🎬

Szukamy osób do udziału w etiudzie studenckiej – zarówno do roli epizodycznej, i statysty

🎭 BOCHATER TRZECIOPLANOWY

Mężczyzna (ok. 40–50 lat)– Polak, mówi po angielsku (lekki polski akcent mile widziany)– 

wygląd: „zwykły”, schludny, nieprzesadnie szczupły ani bardzo umięśniony– typ spokojny, ułożony– 

scena: egzamin ustny, postać przez chwilę prowadzi rozmowę po angielsku

🎭 STATYSTA 

Mężczyzna (ok. 35–50 lat)– wygląd „zwyczajny”– nosi okulary

📅 Termin zdjęć: 12.05 - 15.05 

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na: p.malasiewicz@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

W temacie maila: imię i nazwisko, oraz hasło: egzaminator

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka).

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami. Zapraszamy! 🎥✨

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Casting do NOWEGO 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie! 
9 ról, fajne stawki!!!! Można się zgłaszać do więcej niż jednej roli, jeśli się pasuje 🙂 Więcej informacji o tym, jak się zgłosić, gdzie i do kogo, na samym dole.

1. Hanna Kazak (24) – Białorusinka (lub kobieta o wschodniosłowiańskiej, jasnej urodzie). Kucharka w knajpie, normalnej budowy. (1, PPS2, PPS5) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

2. Palina Petrov (26) – Białorusinka (lub kobieta o wschodniosłowiańskiej, jasnej urodzie). Kucharka w knajpie, mówi ze wschodnim akcentem. Krępa, łatwo ulega emocjom. Mile widziane doświadczenie aktorskie. (6, 10, 20, 22, 23, PPS2, PPS5) 

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 04.05 i 08.05

Stawka: 1400zł na rękę 

3. Igor Socha (29) – Bandzior zajmujący się przemytem ludzi. Wysoki, sprawny fizycznie, zdolny do szybkiej ucieczki; charakterystyczny tatuaż na ciele, chętnie w okolicy szyi. (1, 10-OFF, 18, 22, 23, 23A, PPS5) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.05

Stawka: 600zł na rękę 

4. Paweł Dulski (26) – Bandzior zajmujący się przemytem ludzi. Średniego wzrostu, krótka fryzura „na żołnierza”. (1, 18, 22, 23) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.05

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

5. Sosnowski (42) – Doświadczony lichwiarz. Nieufny, posępny z twarzy, postawny z postępującą łysiną. (11, 12, 13, 14) – PRAWO JAZDY

Terminy: 2 dni zdjęciowe 05.05 i 08.05

Stawka: 1000zł na rękę

6. Właściciel (56) – Właściciel niewielkiej knajpy. Tęga budowa ciała, krótka broda. (5) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

7. Sąsiad (62) – Sąsiad z piętra Paliny. Posiwiały, uśmiechnięty i przyjazny. (17) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.05

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

8. Mundurowy 2 – 3, 18-OFF EPIZOD

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 04.05

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

9. Klient (33) – pożycza kasę u lichwiarza; średniego wzrostu, zaniedbany zarost. (11, 12, 13) 

Termin: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 05.05

Stawka: 300zł na rękę 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:
* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube
* aktualne zdjęcie
* wiek, wzrost, wagę
* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 
* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

This Sunday 26th April.

sharedPost.text:
EXCLUSIVE Free Acting Training with Michael Keogh (@instakeogh) of Peaky Blinders, BBC Casualty and Marvel’s Secret Invasion.

If you want to know:

✅ What casting directors want
✅The key factor to absolutely nail your self-tape
✅ Exactly what to do if you can’t cry or react the way you want to on cue 
✅ The single reason why you aren’t booking the roles you want (it’s something 99% of actors miss)

This class is for YOU.

Sunday 26th April — you’ll also get a $97 free gift for attending.

RSVP at the link below to reserve your place on our Exclusive Free Masterclass

https://bit.ly/4pCzU5V

#actor #actress #actingcoach #nycactor #britishactor

items.text:
Hume Baugh here: I'm doing a scene study class Tuesday May 12-Tuesday June 16, 2026 7-10 pm at The Practice Room 688 Richmond West Rm. 302, Toronto. We will be working on scenes and monologues. You can bring a couple of scenes to the first class, in which we will choose what to work on. You will have lots of time to work on your scene each class, and can work outside of class if you wish. The work will focus on objectives, the scene partner, and the actor's dynamic presence in the room, using one's authentic self. Come and join us - it will be fun, informal, and informative. Get in touch at humebaugh@yahoo.ca if you're interested.

I have been an actor, director and teacher for 43 years in Toronto and elsewhere. I have taught at George Brown, Sheridan College, Fanshawe College, and privately. My acting credits include Stratford, Shaw, Canadian Stage, Tarragon, Factory, Passe Muraille, Theatre Rusticle, Threshold Theatre, Young People's Theatre, Shakespeare in the Rough, Festival of Classics, Blue Ceiling Dance, Ecce Homo, and One Little Goat, among many others. 

I have directed Drums in the Night, Of Mice and Men, The Winter's Tale, (Fanshawe College), ABD with Mark the C (Threshold Theatre), All's Well That Ends Well (Alchemy), Child Hood (Summerworks), Twelfth Night, Therac 25 (Direct Flight Theatre). 

Cost is only $150, payable by etransfer to humebaugh@yahoo.ca upon acceptance into class, first come first served.

THIS IS A GREAT CLASS! Hume really knows his stuff! - Charlotte Moore

items.text:
[KRAKÓW]
Poszukuję aktorki w wieku 20-25 LAT

Projekt to kampania społeczna na temat zdrowia- scenki aranżowanej sondy ulicznej wśród kobiet. Materiały w formie krótkich reels na social media.

📍 Nagrania: 23.04 (czwartek)
godziny: ok. 11:30-16:00

Stawka: 800 zł netto

Produkcja nie przewiduje zwrotu kosztów logistycznych.

❗️Proszę o zgłaszanie się osób, które na pewno mogą być w tym terminie i tych godzinach w Krakowie i które akceptują wszystkie warunki.

Zgłoszenie zawierające:
- zdjęcie portretowe i zdjęcie sylwetki
- krótkie video z mówieniem do kamery (np. wizytówka)
przesyłać na adres: [casting@krakrafilms.com](mailto:casting@krakrafilms.com)

Cześć! Do sesji promocyjnej w klimacie imprezy na działce szukam energicznych i oryginalnych seniorów.

Zdjęcia 18.04 (jutro), godziny 10-15:30 - Warszawa

Poszukiwane role (60+):
1. Senior statysta - stawka 150 zł
Rola: Członek klubu seniorów. Otwarty i rozrywkowy, bierze aktywny udział w imprezie w ogrodzie.

Opłacamy wyżywienie i ewentualne koszty transportu.

Zainteresowanych proszę o zgłoszenia w wiadomościach prywatnych z:
- aktualnymi zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki
- wizytówką
- wiekiem
- wzrostem i wymiarami

21 kwietnia (to już jutro)
Stawka 120 zł. płatne gotówką po planie 

Gramy w Milanówku 🙂 scenę chrzcin 

Na plan nowego serialu szukamy Pana w wieku około50 lat, który wcieli się w rolę członka rodziny bohaterów serialu. 
Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o przesłanie zgłoszenia na adres

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać 
- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek

- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- aktualne zdjęcie (twarz I sylwetka)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – MODELE / AKTORZY 🎬
Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn do udziału w nagraniu reklamy dla kliniki psychologicznej w Poznaniu.  

📍 Lokalizacja: Poznań  

📅 Termin: niedziela, 26 kwietnia  

💸 Stawka: 200 zł / godz.  

Szukamy osób swobodnie czujących się przed kamerą, z naturalną energią i autentycznością – zależy nam na prawdziwych emocjach, nie „sztywnym” aktorstwie.  

📌 Wymagana zgoda na wykorzystanie wizerunku w celach promocyjnych kliniki.  

📩 Zgłoszenia: napisz komentarz pod postem i dodaj link do swojego Instagrama lub portfolio.

items.text:
🎤 Wir suchen DICH!

Für unseren neuen Videopodcast suchen wir eine kleinwüchsige Persönlichkeit mit Charakter – jemand, der locker, witzig und einfach echt ist.

Geplant sind regelmäßige Außendrehs, bei denen wir Leute auf der Straße ansprechen – dafür brauchen wir jemanden, der keine Scheu hat, auf Menschen zuzugehen und dabei für gute Stimmung sorgt 😄

👉 Wichtig ist uns:

- Du bist offen & spontan
- Du hast Humor und nimmst dich selbst nicht zu ernst
- Erfahrung? Nice to have, aber kein Muss

Ob weiblich, männlich oder divers – völlig egal. Hauptsache, du hast Bock drauf!

💡 Aktuell ist das Ganze unentgeltlich, da wir das Projekt komplett selbst aufbauen und noch nichts daran verdienen.

📍 Gedreht wird hauptsächlich im Raum Reutlingen (City, Straße, spontane Spots).

Wenn du denkst „das passt zu mir“ – schreib mir einfach eine PN!

items.text:
Hi zusammen,
wir suchen aktuell noch 5–6 Darsteller für einen Dreh diesen Mittwoch in Düsseldorf. Deshalb wollte ich einfach mal in die Runde fragen, ob jemand von euch Lust hätte, dabei zu sein.

Zum Dreh: Es handelt sich um ein Musikvideo. In der Szene geht es darum, dass mehrere „Politiker“ vor einem modernen Bürogebäude mit einem Künstler interagieren. Das Ganze ist bewusst überspitzt dargestellt – die Politiker stehen quasi Schlange, um bei ihm etwas zu „kaufen“. Wird aber alles so umgesetzt bzw. zensiert, dass nichts Explizites zu sehen ist.

Der Drehaufwand ist gering, maximal ca. 1 Stunde. Gage liegt bei 50 € pro Person.

Da der Aufwand relativ kurz ist, schauen wir aktuell vor allem nach Leuten, die möglichst aus der Nähe kommen, damit sich die Anreise auch lohnt.

Wichtig wäre nur, dass ihr einen Anzug habt.

Falls jemand Zeit und Lust hat, meldet euch gerne! Und wenn ihr noch jemanden kennt, der gut passen könnte, gerne weiterleiten.

Ansonsten wünsche ich euch einen schönen Tag!

topComments.text: Gerne dabei. Nähe Düsseldorf, Anzüge vorhanden.

RATES: *+20% Agency Fee if applicable

Guaranteed at time of booking.

booking.

USAGE

TERM: 3 years

displays, etc.)

You must be represented by Go Talent for this specific casting.

Kids Casting and Project Casting you do not have my permission to share this casting.

email agent@gotalentagency.com 

subject "Miami baby" 

send recent cell phone photo shoulders up and smiling.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - COLORADO FEATURE FILM**

DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE

*After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.*

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives.

Writer/Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain & Jill Coats

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

Locations: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO

**Roles:**

**Sonia ***Lead*

65-72 / Female

Sonia is a 67 year old free spirit who’s spent the last 30 years or so kicking it around Boulder, Colorado after she graduated from Naropa. She’s a sex positive, free wheeling bohemian, who spent the majority of the early 70s trying to relive the 60s. Lots of acid and counter-cultural literature, Grateful Dead shows and the like, until she became a mom. That’s Sonia’s past though. We meet Sonia in the present day; after the death of her beloved husband, Michael, she has plenty of alone time to look back on her full life before her adult son, Ezra, moves back in. Sonia purports strength and wisdom, but really, she seems to be grieving the loss of youth. As she looks at her mortality squarely, she decides to take things into her own hands, and she sets out to end her own life through Medical Aid in Dying, even though she doesn’t exactly qualify…
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Ezra ***Lead*

30-36 / Male

Ezra is a 34 year old man who – more often than not – has something to say about, well, everything. He has an MFA in Creative Writing & PhD in Postmodern Literature from Denver University, and he’s got a whole bunch of opinions on what makes up a valuable opinion. He’s the kind of guy who’s quick to comment on why a certain book or film is low brow, and he's hellbent on being the smartest guy in the room – even if it’s at the expense of those around him. He’s a “writer” but really, lately, he’s a professor that writes. We meet Ezra at quite the inflection point in his life – his wife has left him, he’s moved back in with his mother (whom he has an irrationally short fuse with) and he’s recently been placed on sabbatical for the upcoming semester. Ezra’s looking for answers, even if he won’t admit it until he absolutely must.
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Hayduke ***Supporting*

65-75 / Male

Hayduke is a 70 year old male. Ex-hippie, Grateful Dead fan, very counter cultural. Strong comedic skills preferred.

* Rate: ~$1,500 Project Flat
* Duration: ~3 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/12 - 7/14

_______________________________________
Thank you for your interest in our project! Please submit here:
[[[https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)

Please keep an eye out for more roles and updates in the coming weeks. Cheers!

Stunt Actors for Short Western
Hello, we are looking for a few male stunt actors or actors interested in stunt work to play henchman in our upcoming Western project entitled "Stead" being produced by Seniors at the University of Colorado Denver. If you are interested please email resume, headshot, and any relevant experience to Jack.Kabel@UCDenver.edu. More details below.

Production Title: STEAD 

Type: Studnet Short 

Compensation: Food, Reel, Lodinging

Location: Crestone, CO

Dates: May 20-26th

items.text:
BOEING BOEING ACTOR CALL OUT!
Rowntree Players are delighted to announce that audition registration for Boeing Boeing is now open✈️

Don’t miss your chance to be part of this fast-paced, hilarious comedy — we’d love to see you there!

Register now and get ready for take-off… 👀✨

Click the link to read our audition pack and register - https://www.rowntreeplayers.co.uk/ 

🎭 Boeing Boeing

📅 23rd - 25th July 2026

📍 The Joseph Rowntree Theatre, York

Cleared for Takeoff: A High-Flying Farce!�This 1960s French farce adapted for the English-speaking stage features self-styled Parisian lothario Bernard, who has Italian, German and American fiancées, each a beautiful airline hostess with frequent “layovers.” He keeps “one up, one down, and one pending” – until unexpected schedule changes bring all three to Paris, and Bernard’s apartment, at the same time.

items.text:
Heya
Just wanted to introduce myself. I’m based between Brighton and London, and have had a strong passion for creation and expression.  I have a strong interest in projects that lean into more depth and emotion. 

I’m always happy and open to collaborate and get involved wherever I can, whether that’s on screen, or supporting the wider creative process. I appreciate being a part of projects that aim to create something a little different.

Looking forward to connecting with you all and seeing what’s we could work on!

Hello! I’m a professional hairstylist based in London with over 7 years of experience.

I’m currently looking for a model for a free creative haircut to build my portfolio. This is a great opportunity if you’re open to a fresh, stylish look and would like a high-quality cut at no cost.

If you’re interested, please send me a message with a recent photo of your hair. I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
“261 ईसा पूर्व…
एक ऐसा युद्ध हुआ… जिसने इतिहास बदल दिया।

वो जीत गया था…
लेकिन पहली बार… खुद से हार गया।

जब 1 लाख लोगों की चीखें…
ताज से भी भारी लगने लगे…
तभी एक सम्राट… इंसान बना।

तलवार से जीतना आसान है…
लेकिन अपने ही कर्मों के साथ जीना… सबसे मुश्किल।”

⸻

आपके हिसाब से असली जीत क्या है — दूसरों को हराना या खुद को? 👇

⸻

⚠️ Disclaimer

⚠️ This content is created using AI for educational, motivational, and storytelling purposes. Historical references are simplified for impact and may not represent exact events or interpretations.

⸻

#SamratAshok #HistoryFacts #LifeLesson #MindsetMatters #KarmaTruth #LimitlessLove

items.text:
Could anyone recommend a casting agency in the north west for an under 18 (14 years)
There’s so many scams about and just want a personal recommendation if possible 

Thanks

topComments.text:
Hi I assume you mean talent agency... There are lots of legitimate ones but you are right there are some scams out there...so for a start ignore sponsored ads on Google or any place rated on trustpilot etc... reputable agencies don't need to rely on advertising or reviews ..
Location of agency is irrelevant. 14 is a very tough age to start out because lots of experienced kids already on agent's books so few gaps and very few opportunities as teens are usually played by 16+ if not 18+ so do think about waiting until after GCSES and they are out of licensing and opportunities increase...
May I suggest you join the following group for further advice and if you read the featured posts there is a list of recommended reputable agencies x 
Children's Acting, Modelling, Casting Calls & FREE Advice for Parents UK
Articulate Drama School & Agency  is very good.

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text: Submitted a couple of self tapes this week. And got a call back, in person, audition for one of them. It can be so frustrating but this has been a good week!
I landed a self tape for a vertical 🙌🏼 fingers crossed that was a hell of a script I had to perform 🔥

items.text:
望 Horizon
Casting Call

Non union

South Scarborough

Volunteer 

Independent, volunteer film project entitled 望 Horizon, exploring quiet, emotional moments and human connection.

Looking for two male actors (20s–30s) interested in:

 • Collaborative character development

 • Naturalistic, subtle performance

 • Building chemistry on camera

Location: Scarborough Bluffs / South Scarborough (Toronto area)

Note: This is a BL-inspired project, focusing on emotional intimacy between two male characters. There is no nudity or explicit sexual content. 

You don’t need to identify in any particular way—the focus is on acting, presence, and interaction.

Interested? Message this Page with a short introduction and optional photos or clips. 

If you have seen the brilliant Japanese BL entitled More Than Words, then you will understand the kind of vibe I’m looking for. 

I also have a YouTube channel with examples of my exploratory works, which will give you an idea of the production level and tone of my work.

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - TV SERIES
We’re a passionate team of film makers looking to cast for the next few episodes of our TV series **“UNDONE” **

**There are multiple supporting & Featured roles up for grabs! **

We’re looking for:

**DARNELL: Male Presenting, BIPOC, 27-37, Supporting**

An introverted, devastatingly handsome graphic designer from LA, with a magnetic presence. Darnell is fiery, loyal, and deeply romantic. Looking for emotional depth, ease, warmth, and attunement.

**ALBERT: Male Presenting, 20’s, Supporting**

A streamer/influencer born and bred in LA. Trendy, alert, and always where the party is. Albert is deaf due to tinnitus from years of clubbing starting young, and he reads lips to navigate the world - REQUIRES STRONG COMEDIC TIMING & PHYSICAL PRESENCE

**BILL / HILL: Male & Female Presenting, Caucasian, 50’s - 60’s, Featured**

Jake’s parents, William & Hillary. A warm, tight-knit Southern family with deep roots and strong values. Wealthy farmers who’ve built a life through hard work and family loyalty. They are loving, protective (especially of their sons), and grounded in tradition. Looking for natural chemistry, warmth, and authenticity—actors who can embody both strength and tenderness.

**RON: Male Presenting, Caucasian, 50’s - 60’s, Featured**

A fast-talking venture capitalist with a polished exterior and a slightly slimy edge; think high-powered, always on the move, and used to getting his way. He dates younger and thrives in chaos

**JACKIE: Female Presenting, BIPOC, 45-70’s, Featured**

A grounded, nurturing figure who is a reliable source of support and wisdom. Jackie is a skilled hair braider with a calm presence; the kind of person you can confide inJackie offers both beauty and emotional care with every braid. Looking for warmth, authenticity, and the ability to embody a deep, pure connection with a no nonsense edge. Pam Grier type.

📩** Email your EOI:**

contact@beartigerproductions.com or

elsullivann@outlook.com

🇺🇸 **General American Accent required**

🚫** No DMs — email only**

⏳ **Deadline: July 30**

📍 **Sydney or Los Angeles based only**

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES — HOSPITALITY INDUSTRIAL — NON-UNION

Location: Inglewood

Date: Monday, May 11

Time: 1 PM – 4 PM

Rate: $75

Casting for (7) speaking actor roles for a growing hospitality venture. 

ISO: 
1. **The Veteran Captain (M)**
Late 50s, calm to the point of mystery. He’s flown through everything; storms, system failures, even a rumored hijacking decades ago; but never talks about it. Younger pilots see him as a legend, though his reluctance to embrace new technology sometimes causes friction. Off-duty, he quietly builds model planes with obsessive precision.

1. **The Rule-Breaking First Officer (F)**
Early 30s, sharp, ambitious, and just a little too confident. She’s a brilliant pilot who cuts corners on protocol when she thinks she knows better; sometimes she does. Constantly butting heads with authority, she’s trying to prove she belongs in a space that hasn’t always welcomed her.

1. **The Charismatic Flight Attendant (F)**
Mid-20s, effortlessly charming and always one step ahead of passengers’ needs. They can defuse tense situations with humor and read people instantly; but hide a surprisingly complicated personal life. Dreams of becoming an actor, and treats every flight like a stage.

1. **The Overworked Aircraft Mechanic (M)**
40s, grease-stained and perpetually tired, but a genius with engines. Works night shifts and knows every plane in the fleet like an old friend. Cynical on the surface, but deeply protective of “their” aircraft and the people who fly in them. Keeps a secret notebook of recurring mechanical quirks no one else seems to notice.

1. **The Rookie Flight Attendant (M)**
Early 20s, wide-eyed and eager, fresh out of training. They memorized every safety procedure but struggle with real-world unpredictability—difficult passengers, delays, and crew politics. Over time, their idealism starts to clash with reality, forcing them to grow up fast.

1. **The Veteran Flight Attendant (F)**
Early 50s, impeccably composed, with decades of experience etched into every perfectly timed smile. She’s seen the golden age of air travel fade into budget cuts and packed cabins, and she carries a quiet nostalgia for how things used to be. To new crew members, she’s equal parts mentor and enforcer; she’ll teach you everything, but won’t tolerate shortcuts. Passengers trust her instantly, especially when things go wrong. 

1. **The Young Pilot (M)**
Mid-20s, recently promoted from first officer after an unusually fast rise. Technically gifted and deeply passionate about flying, but still learning how to command authority in high-pressure situations. He idolizes the veteran captain and tries to emulate his calm demeanor, sometimes overcorrecting into silence when he should speak up. Off the flight deck, he’s more relaxed; awkward, even; and still adjusting to the responsibility of having hundreds of lives in his hands.

If interested, please submit the following to [alex@layoverclub.app](mailto:alex@layoverclub.app): 

- Contact information

- Headshot, full body shot, reel

- Resume 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Name,Last Name - Role(s) - TLC Shoot

Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

Casting Call - 2 Female Actors
Casting for a final SAE short film (JHB/PTA).

Looking for 2 strong female performances (lead + supporting).

Details in post below.

We’re looking for 2 female roles:
* Early 20s (Lead)
* 40s–50s (Supporting)
* (White / Caucasian)

📍 Filming: 13–16 June (Johannesburg & Pretoria)

🎭 Rehearsals: May

topComments.text:
Unless you’re rich, I’d avoid moving to Los Angeles.  You can get so much further by staying in Europe and sending audition tapes from here.

If you get an in person audition, I’d advise renting a room for a month or so in LA and book as many in person auditions while you’re in town.

Rent, even for a room in a less desirable area, is outrageous!  After moving to Germany from Seattle, I now pay more than $800 LESS per month in rent and I live in a furnished apartment that is ~ 1.5 to 2 times the rate than would be charged on the unfurnished market.

My utilities, groceries, healthcare, etc. are ALL cheaper in Germany.

Get experience here and in the UK before heading to the USA.

items.text:
Stuck on your next step in Hollywood?

Most actors chase one-off bookings. I architect lasting careers and change destinies.

I’m Coach Kent—a former NYC prosecutor who now builds case-winning performances as a SAG-AFTRA actor of 40+ years. I’m also Hollywood’s branding architect (18+ years transforming careers), a national headline stand-up comedian, and the author of three authoritative acting books.

My unorthodox path is your advantage:

· The Legal Strategist: A former prosecutor and online law professor who dissects scripts like a trial case and has been the legal expert for major music videos.
· The Corporate Trainer: I’ve drilled commanding presence into leaders at giants like Blue Cross Blue Shield.
· The Showman: From national comedy stages to a Dr. Phil celebrity look-alic, I master persona and impact.
· The Destiny Architect: For over 18 years, I haven't just coached actors. I've coached kids, couples, families, doctors, lawyers, judges, and celebrities—packaging unique personas into undeniable brands, backed by over 450 testimonials.

I don't just teach technique. I provide the strategic fusion of law, performance, and marketing that builds empires. I transform raw potential into a booked, working professional with commanding presence across every platform.

Ready to change your destiny? Send me a DM with the word “DESTINY.”

Let’s build your empire.

KentKasper.net..

The Headline: The 24/7 Celebrity Mentor (Your Secret Weapon in a Town That Eats Hopes for Breakfast)

Forget everything you think you know about "acting coaches."

In an industry where 90% of actors quit within a few years—swallowed by the noise, the rejection, and the chaos—you need more than just a teacher. You need a lifeline. You need a strategist, a therapist, a hype-man, and a legal mind who knows exactly where the Hollywood minefields are buried.

You need Kent Kasper.

Having Kent on your team isn't just hiring a coach. It’s like having a 24/7 concierge for your career. It’s having someone in your corner who ensures that while the other 90% are tapping out, you’re stepping up.

---

What is Kent? He’s the "Swiss Army Knife" of Show Business.

· Part Mentor: Who extracts the gold from your gut and puts it on the screen.
· Part Life Coach: Who keeps you sane when the silence is deafening.
· Part Teacher: Who hands you the tools.
· Part Guide: Who walks you through the dark.
· A splash of Muse: To spark the fire.
· A dash of Magic: Because let's face it, you need it in Tinseltown.

Kent Kasper is the Master Power Coach who proves that "luck" is just a fancy word for what happens when opportunity meets preparation. And no one—and I mean no one—prepares you like Kent.

---

The Résumé of a Warrior (And Why It Matters to You)

Kent isn’t a theorist. He’s a SAG-AFTRA working actor with 40+ years of blood, sweat, and applause. He has navigated the very trenches you’re trying to cross.

· The Laughs: A national headlining comedian for over a decade. (HBO, Showtime, Netflix, Comedy Central—yeah, those stages).
· The Credits: Co-starred in over 25 TV shows (Mad Men, Monk, Rules of Engagement) and 20 films (Apollo 13, Space Jam).
· The Face: Starred in over 200 commercials. (If you’ve watched TV in the last 20 years, you’ve seen him).
.  Veteran of over a dozen vertical micro dramas.
· The Icon: For 18 years, he was the go-to Dr. Phil lookalike—doubling for him in commercials, films, and private events.
· The Legal Eagle: He holds a master degree and a law degree from Thurgood Marshall School of Law and served as a NYC Assistant District Attorney. (He knows how to read contracts so you don't have to cry later).
. Author of 4 acting books on Amazon 
. Corporate Trainer -Consultant - Keynote speaker to top Fortune 500 companies..

His Philosophy: "Don't Fight Your Type, Master It!"

---

The Kent Kasper Difference: The "Concierge" Treatment

Most coaches give you a one-hour slot and send you on your way. Kent gives you systems.

His laser-focused, battle-tested methodology covers 100+ essential areas of the biz that most actors don’t even know exist. We’re talking:

· Audition Preparation: Turning your nerves into nuclear weapons. Booking the room!

· The Trinity (Agent/Manager/CD Blitzes): Getting you in the rooms that matter
.
· Branding, Marketing & Packaging: Turning you from a "hopeful" into a product Hollywood wants to buy.

· Demo Tape Preparation: Because your reel is your resume.

.Vertical micro drama prep .

.Photo shoot branding & packaging 

Working with Kent increases your opportunities by 1000%. And when those opportunities come? He prepares you like a heavyweight boxer stepping into the ring with Iron Mike Tyson. You won't just survive; you'll dominate.

---

Who Has Kent Coached?

Everyone. Literally.

From diapers to Depends..

He’s worked with families, couples,toddlers tweens ,teens ,seniors and friends. He’s helped firefighters, doctors, lawyers, bus drivers, teachers, veterans, chefs, and salesmen drop their day-job identities and pick up their acting dreams.

Whether you’re in your living room or on the other side of the globe, Kent is there. Sessions are available in-person, or via FaceTime, Zoom, Instagram, and Facebook Messenger.

---

The Bottom Line (Irresistible Edition)

You can try to navigate the Hollywood minefield alone. You can hope for a lucky break. You can be one of the 90% who bows out.

Or, you can have a 24/7 ally.

You can have a man who has been a lawyer, corporate trainer , a professional union actor , published author , a comedian, a TV star, a Dr. Phil celebrity look alike and a mentor to thousands. You can have someone who answers the call when you're panicking before an audition, who strategizes when you're lost, and who celebrates when you win.

There is no other coach on this planet with the background, the care, and the relentless drive of Kent Kasper.

This is your invitation. Let’s get to work.
.:

items.text: Hi everyone! I’m looking to step into the acting space and build my confidence and on-camera experience. I’m open to auditions, casting calls, and creative projects with directors and creatives who are also growing their portfolio. I’m especially drawn to artistic, emotive, and darker, fantasy-inspired concepts. I also have a background in modelling, makeup artistry, and painting, so I love bringing characters and visions to life. My goal is to transition into paid acting work while building my personal brand and on-screen presence. If you have any opportunities or would like to collaborate, I’d love to connect 🖤

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors wanting to level up their craft and career?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Clint Eastwood’s Jersey Boys and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit show Once Upon a Time.

I’m currently opening a limited number of spots for 1:1 coaching sessions for adult actors.

These sessions are ideal for actors who want focused support with accents (Standard American, RP British), audition preparation, and refining their technique.

Sessions run for 1 hour via Zoom and can include:

• Accent coaching (American, RP, and more)
• Audition preparation for film, television, and self-tapes
• Script analysis and character work
• Self-tape technique and performance adjustments

These are tailored one-on-one sessions, so we can focus on what you need - whether that’s general skill development or preparing for an upcoming audition.

I also offer a career coaching and mentorship program for actors looking for guidance in navigating the industry.

Feel free to send me a message for more details or to book a spot.

items.text:
⚡️Affordable Showreel Editing Service⚡️
Happy Sunday all! 

Need your first showreel creating or to update your old one? 

I provide a very affordable showreel service for new or established actors/directors/cinematographers/comedians/hobbyists etc. 

Basically, send me your footage (or I can try and source it for you online if it's commercially aired) and I shall edit it together into a lovely reel. 

Please see samples of recent clients in the link below 😎 

I'm an actor myself so I know how frustrating it can be, especially when you're starting out, to collate your footage together to get more work, without wanting to spend a fortune. 

My rates are £25/hour, with duration of work depending on how much footage you have. The average reels have been around £100 for my clients. Much more affordable than the companies that charge £250+ !! 

For any further info / enquiries / to book my services, drop me an email and I'll respond as quickly as I can: 

reelsforanyone@gmail.com 

I'll look forward to hearing from you. 

Thanks! 

😎

sharedPost.text:
📣📣CASTING📣📣

Zapraszamy na dwuetapowy casting, z pierwszym etapem online! Szukamy aktorki w wieku 18+ do zagrania w spektaklu - bajce kurdyjskiej na podstawie książki "Opowieści Dengbeżów. Baśnie i bajki kurdyjskie". Mile widziane są umiejętności animacji, gdyż w spektaklu wykorzystamy animację lalką.

Premiera spektaklu jest planowana na początek czerwca, próby do spektaklu w maju w weekendy oraz w trakcie majówki w Zamościu (woj. lubelskie) oraz Kielcach (woj. świętokrzyskie), stąd wymagamy dostępności w tym okresie.

Eksploatację spektaklu planujemy w lato 2026 w trakcie festiwali (m.in. Pol'and'Rock Festiwal w Strefie Warsztatów ASP) dlatego dostępność w czerwcu, lipcu i sierpniu również jest dla nas ważna.

📣📣 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila: fundacjabanina@gmail.com 📣📣

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: 
✅ twoje CV
✅ wizytówkę, w formie linku do YouTube

❗Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 23 kwietnia❗

Casting może się przedłużyć, w przypadku gdy w wyznaczonym czasie nie znajdziemy odpowiedniej osoby.

O zakończeniu castingu poinformujemy na naszych social mediach tj. Facebook i Instagram

items.text:
**🎬 [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.

## **🎬 PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short

## **🎭 ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera

## **📍**LOCATION 
* London, Battersea Power 

## **📅 SHOOT DETAILS** 
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**

## **💸 COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel

## **📩 TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow [https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/](https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/)

items.text:
5 days workshop with Song of the Goat Theatre
This five-day laboratory is designed for actors, performers, dancers, singers, and theatre makers who wish to deepen the integration of body, voice, rhythm, and perception in their artistic practice.

📅 𝙒𝙝𝙚𝙣: 27–31 August 2026

📍 𝙒𝙝𝙚𝙧𝙚: Wrocław, Song of the Goat Theatre

💰 𝙋𝙧𝙞𝙘𝙚: 1150 €⟶900 € (until end of June)

📧 𝙈𝙖𝙞𝙡: fundacjabrala@gmail.com

📞 𝙋𝙝𝙤𝙣𝙚: +48 668 133 769 (Alicja Bral)

LIMITED SPOTS!

To apply, please send:

* A short description of your artistic background

* A brief statement of interest

* Optional link to a video of your work

More info: https://www.facebook.com/events/1454246299731934/?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22home%22%7D%2C%7B%22mechanism%22%3A%22attachment%22%2C%22surface%22%3A%22newsfeed%22%7D]%2C%22ref_notif_type%22%3Anull%7D

items.text:
🌟 **CASTING CALL: Male-Identifying Performer for Danny Go! Tribute Show** 🌟
Are you ready to bring the energy and get everyone moving? We are casting a vibrant, male-identifying performer to step into the shoes of Danny Go! for an exciting live tribute show at Otterspool Adventure in Liverpool.

**📍 Location:** Otterspool Adventure, Liverpool
**📅 Initial Dates:** 16th & 17th May
*(Note: There will be further work available throughout the year in this role and within our numerous other productions!)*

**The Role:**
 * You will host and perform a fast-paced, 30-minute scripted one-man show.
 * You must be highly confident, able to command the stage, and bring massive amounts of energy.
 * Crucially, you must have the skills to keep an audience of toddlers fully engaged and entertained from start to finish!
* Visually, you'll be able to accurately portray the role of Danny Go!

**Remuneration:**
 * **Rehearsals:** Paid hourly at the National Minimum Wage (NMW) for your age group.
 * **Performance Days:** £100 per day.

**How to Apply:**
Please send your CV and a headshot or recent photograph to **adam@ajdance.co.uk**.

*Important: Please ensure you use the subject line "Danny Go" so your application is not missed.
*
Tag any fantastic performers below who would be perfect for this! 👇🎭

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
May be an image of guitar and text

sharedPost.text:
Acting is Not the Jobs

I wrote this monologue for the actors in my weekly workshop in Ryde. 

But really, it’s for every actor who’s ever sat in their car after class thinking, “Why do I do this?”

It’s for the ones juggling shifts and self-tapes.  
For the ones who haven’t booked in a year but still turn up on Tuesday nights.  
For the drama students wondering if the industry even wants them.

Acting isn’t just the jobs. The jobs are rare.  
Acting is finding yourself in yourself.  
It’s finding yourself in others.  
It’s the reminder that you’re not mad — there are other humans on this earth just as obsessed with telling stories as you are.

If you need that reminder today, this one’s for you.

#Acting #ActorsLife #Theatre #DramaSchool #ActorsCommunity #UKTheatre #IsleOfWight #VentnorFringe
#Acting #ActorsLife #Theatre #UKActors

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – North West UK**
Looking for actors for an upcoming  film shot in South Manchester. 

Casting call .  Fake News series. Comedy/ Drama 

3 supporting roles 

Follow the project on Instagram:  @fakenewsmovie

✨ Mum / Auntie 

Aged 35-52

Brown eyes , naturally Brunette hair ( could be dyed)

4'10-5'3.

Storyline  , your betrayal your daughter Trust.

✨ Jessica 18/20

Storyline : you accidentally break your cousins trust 

✨ Maria 

18-24

Able to do a French  European accent or naturally European.

Storyline : you fall in love in a meet cute and exchange messages  with a boy.

Drama / action  comedy , satire .

A young man will take massive risks to his freedom to try and win back his girlfriend.

📍 Manchester) Stockport 

📅 Dates TBC - May /June 

⚠️ Unpaid (travel + catering provided)

📩 Send headshot, availability & showreel to:

richardmichaelmartinhowe1@outlook.com

Email for more information and send either video link , or a show reel link , your c.v. or spotlight.

All applications are fully considered. So don't hesitate to send some information and something for us to watch about yourself and highlights your acting and performing talents.

Please share with actors in the **North West

#CastingCallUK #NorthWestActors #ActorsWanted #IndieFilm #ShortFilmCasting

sharedPost.text:
𝗠𝗮𝘆 𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻? 𝗬𝗘𝗦! May Summer Acting with Dancing Workshop ang Acting Core sa lugar kung saan ang pag-arte at pagsayaw ang matututunan! Matuto umarte ng pang-television, film, at commercial kasama ang FAMAS actor na si 𝗔𝗱𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗖𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗱𝗼. Learn Hip-hop dance for beginners with our new instructor 𝗝𝗼𝘀𝗵𝘂𝗮 𝗟𝗶𝗺, to push your limits and unlock your full performance energy using your body. 🌴☀️

What’s inside our Summer Workshop? 
✅Acting training for Television, film, and commercials.
✅Experience being part of our workshop’s final performance, “Stranded on an Island.”
✅Basic Hip-hop dance Workshop.
✅Dance Recital at the end of the session.
✅Plus exciting surprise inclusions!

👦Open to ages 8 - 15 years old! With or without experience is okay!

📆How to enroll? Register through our GForm Link -> https://forms.gle/gT7sUTXyWC2zSv579

❗️ Reserve your slot early and get a discount! 

#actingcore #summerworkshop #workshopph

items.text: Any agents/agencies in Atlanta that are seeking an African American 3 month old girl?

topComments.text: Atlanta is a big market for babies/kids in my opinion. It’s very easy to research on your own when you’re in such a big market. I’m not from Atlanta so I can’t think of any off the top of my head that accepts newborns but District model and talent is California based but they represent in the southeast market as well and also takes babies starting from newborn. My son has been signed with them since 4 months old!

items.summary: Any agents/agencies in Atlanta that are seeking an African American 3 month old girl?

items.text:
Get in touch ASAP!!! Looking for a male actor 18 - 22 year old for a new pilot being shot in June/July. Below is a description of what we’re looking for. Very important all points are met. 

- From London with an authentic London accent. 
- Mixed race (black and white) 
- Athletic build 
- Experience is ideal but not essential 
- NEEDS TO BE 18-22 years old. No exceptions!!!

Looking for this person urgently!!! If you fit the bill, comment below or drop me a DM and I can send you the official casting call etc.
items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK

items.text:
Hi guys, who wants to be in my movie today? We need lots of extras for a theater scene in Hollywood. It’s deferred payment (meaning you get paid when the movie sells and yes, we have star names attached ) on a SAG micro -if you’re interested, please text me an say EXTRA- (213)598-1029

Time would be 430/5pm

(DALLAS) LOOKING TO CAST ROLES ( TALENT MUST BE IN DALLAS)
FEATURE FILM / DARK COMEDY

TITLE: TOP HITTERS

LOCATION: DALLAS, TEXAS

PAID / MEALS / IMDB CREDIT

EVOLVE ENTERTAINMENT / BOOMTOWN PRODUCTIONS / MIGNON PICTURES

OPEN CASTING CALL

DATE: APRIL 18, 2026 

LOCATION: 3005 E Abram St

Arlington, TX 

                    

TIME: 2:00– 6:00 pm

PLEASE BRING: HEADSHOT & RESUME

ONLINE SUBMISSIONS

DEADLINE TO SUBMIT APRIL 20, 2026 

EMAIL INFORMATION TO: 

Tophittersmovie@gmail.com

PLEASE SEND PROFESSIONAL

HEADSHOT/RESUME/MONOLOGUE

SYNOPSIS: ON THE BRINK OF RETIREMENT, TWO LONG TIME DRUG RUNNERS ARE COERCED INTO BECOMING CONTRACT KILLERS.  UNABLE TO PULL THE TRIGGER, THEY SECRETLY HIDE THEIR INTENDED TARGETS, RISKING THEIR LIVES AS THEY TRY TO OUTSMART THE RUTHLESS UNDERWORLD THAT EXPECTS BODIES…

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

BIG MICKEY – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 30's TO EARLY 40's.

ROLANDO – HISPANIC MALE, EARLY 30’S, HEAVY SET BUILD, SLICK TALKER, MUST BE COMFORTABLE 

       WITH ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

DUKE – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE, MID TO LATE 20’s, MEDIUM BUILT, MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH 

              ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

ABRAHAM – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE EARLY 30’S, SLIM BUILD, SLICK TALKER, AMBITIOUS, MUST BE 

                      COMFORTABLE WITH ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

BIG EL KINGPIN – HISPANIC MALE, MID TO LATE 40’s, SHORT STOCKY, DRUG LORD.

BRUNO – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 20's TO EARLY 30's, MUSCULAR BUILD, ATHLETIC, BODYGUARD. 

TONY – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 20's TO EARLY 30's, MUSCULAR BUILD, ATHLETIC, BODYGUARD. 

DETECTIVE STEWART– OPEN RACE, LATE 40's, TALL , FIT, ATHLETIC BUILD, CROOKED COP. 

DETECTIVE SIMMS (ROOKIE COP) – CAUCASIAN MALE, MID 30's. 

BLUE – CAUCASIAN MALE, EARLY 30's, DRUG DEALER. 

BROTHER-IN-LAW  – CAUCASIAN MALE, LATE 30's TO EARLY 40's, SLIM BUILD, INTELLECTUAL TYPE WITH

                                    GLASSES. 

DETECTIVE BARRY WHITZ – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE, LATE 40's, POLICE OFFICER , SOLID  BUILD, 

                                                  SERIOUS DEMENOR.

PHIL THE GIL – AFRICIAN AMERICAN MALE, EARLY 30's, CORNER BOY DRUG DEALER, SNITCH.

SANDRA (ROLANDO'S GIRLFRIEND)  –  CAUCASIAN FEMALE, EARLY 40's, FORMER PARTY GIRL PAST HER 

                                                                    PRIME.

ZADI –  ASIAN FEMALE, 30's, SERIOUS, NO-NONSENSE DEMEANOR.

GINA –  ASIAN FEMALE, 30's, FIT BUILD, BODYGUARD.

VICTIM #1 –  ASIAN MALE, 40's, GANGSTER, TOUGH GUY.

LEE –  ASIAN MALE, MID 30's.

WAITRESS –  AFRICAN AMERICAN FEMALE, 20's ,CURVY BUILD, SASSY. 

EMAIL INFORMATION TO:

Tophittersmovie@gmail.com

PLEASE SEND PROFESSIONAL

HEADSHOT/RESUME/MONOLOGUE

ONLINE SUBMISSIONS

DEADLINE TO SUBMIT APRIL 20, 2026

**BACKGROUND CASTING CALL FOR "JEWFACE" A SHORT FILM BY MELISSA CENTER:**

*A film centered around Jewish Identity is seeking BACKGROUND PERFORMERS. Copy, credit, and meals provided. Please email a headshot and one fun fact about yourself to **HELLO@PINKAMONGMEN.COM**.*

*We are so grateful for your interest and can't wait to hear from you!*

**BAT MITZVAH ATTENDEES:**

- SEEKING BOYS AND GIRLS AGES 11-15 FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

- SEEKING ADULTS + RELATIVES, MEN AND WOMEN AGES 20 - 60S  FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

**SOFTBALL CAMP GOERS:**

**- **SEEKING GIRLS AGES 15 - 18, OR 18 TO PLAY YOUNGER FOR A JEWISH SUMMER CAMP SOFTBALL SCENE THAT TAKES PLACE IN THE YEAR 2000. FILMS IN MAPLEWOOD, NEW JERSEY, ON SATURDAY 4/18. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (YEAR 2000 WARDROBE)

**NYC STREET PASSERBYS:**

- QUEER, BIPOC INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. Ages 20s- 40s and 60-70s, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE )

- OLD JEWISH MAN: 80’S, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-BOUGIE ASIAN INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. AGES 30S-40S. FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-ARAB-LOOKING MAN:  FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-TOUGH-LOOKING MAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE- TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-PASSERBY #1: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

items.text:
****CASTING CALL FOR INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM*****

**TITLE: **Vinyl Nights

**DIRECTOR: **Brandon Maxwell

**CONTACT: **gyrescapefilm@gmail.com

**SHOOT DATE: **June 2026 (date dependent on availability) in LA

**GENRE: **LGBTQ+ period rom-com

**LOGLINE: **Billy and Tommy, two seemingly polar-opposite waiters at a small-town diner, form an unexpected connection in their late-night shifts. As their relationship deepens, they’re forced to confront the limitations of their small town and decide whether love is something they can afford to risk in pursuit of their big dreams.

-------- 

**ROLES:**

**All roles are paid and must be comfortable with same-sex kissing. Dance experience preferred as well.**

**Billy **(Lead, male-identifying, 18-25)
* Artsy, expressive, and a little guarded
* Dreams of leaving town to pursue Broadway
* Uses humor and attitude to mask his true emotions

**Tommy **(Lead, male-identifying, 18-25)
* High school jock type
* Confident, grounded, sincere
* Dreams of being a writer but grapples with his family values

If interested, please comment your email and role(s) of interest below and I’ll reach out with more info! Please do not DM as those will not be read. Self tapes and headshots will be requested for each part. :)

items.text:
Your self-tape is your audition. Make it count! 🎬
Master the Commercial Self-Tape is a hands-on class where you submit a tape every week and get real, specific feedback so you walk away better every single time. Stop guessing and start booking! 🔥

Spots are limited, claim yours before they're gone: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes#mtcst-commercial-actingclass

#SelfTape #CommercialActing #KeepItRealActing

items.text:
NOW CASTING:
Looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Looking for different actors of all ages to volunteer to be background actors in one short scene filming in the Los Angeles area June 30th.

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Filming in the Los Angeles / SFV area. 

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.text:
CASTING CALL: New Project Shooting this August!

Project Title: Shades of Identity

Type: independent film

Be part of a powerful story that explores the raw realities of colorism, sisterhood, and the courage to be seen. We are seeking 30+ diverse extras of all backgrounds and styles to help bring the world of Shades of Identity to life. This is an unpaid project, but it is a major opportunity to gain on-set experience, secure high-quality footage for your reel/portfolio, and earn an official film credit. The roles we need to fill.

We are officially casting for an upcoming project and would love to see your talent! Since we are keeping things streamlined, auditions will be held entirely online. WE SHOOT IN THE BOSTON’S AND SOMERVILLE AREA.

The Details
Shoot Date: August 2026

How to Apply: Choose a monologue for the role you’re interested in, record your self-tape, and email it directly to me!

Character Breakdown
We are looking for the following roles:

Lena (16–23): Black/Dark-skinned.

Maya (16–23): Black/Light-skinned.

Ashley (16–23): Plus-size.

Erica (16–23)

Theresa (16–23)

Aaron (16–23): The gay best friend; charismatic and loyal.

Tyla (16–23): The "mean girl" with a colorist attitude.

Camilla (16–23): Tyla’s sidekick.

Mr. Jones (45–55): The father figure; grounded and protective.

Therapist (35–55): Calm, professional, and observant.

Ready to Submit?
Please send your video auditions to: bmg30genzpub@gmail.com 

Tag a friend who would be perfect for one of these roles! We can't wait to see your submissions. 🎥🌟

items.text:
Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente 

In der Folge "Mein Auto, dein Auto" aus "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze" bin ich in einem der spannendsten Handlungsstränge des Formats zu sehen. Aus einem scheinbar harmlosen Moment beim Magnetangeln wird plötzlich eine hochexplosive Lage, genau diese Verdichtung aus Alltag, Zuspitzung und glaubwürdigem Spiel macht für mich den besonderen Reiz solcher Produktionen aus. 

Mein Dank geht an Joyn, Sat.1 und ganz besonders an filmpool für ein Format, das Tempo, Spannung und Publikumsnähe so wirkungsvoll verbindet. Solche Produktionen zeigen, wie wichtig jedes präzise gesetzte Bild, jede glaubwürdige Reaktion und jede stimmige Figur für die Gesamtwirkung einer Szene ist. 

Ich bringe in solche Einsätze nicht nur natürliche Präsenz vor der Kamera ein, sondern auch ein tiefes Verständnis für Bildwirkung, Timing, Atmosphäre und Produktionsabläufe. Genau diese Verbindung aus Darsteller, Content Creator, Produzent und Kameramensch macht mich für unterschiedlichste Formate interessant, ob TV, Werbung, Doku-Fiction, Social Ads oder fiktionale Stoffe mit realitätsnaher Tonalität. 

Wer für fiktive zukünftige Projekte einen verlässlichen, kameraaffinen und vielseitig einsetzbaren Darsteller sucht, findet in mir eine starke, professionelle und teamorientierte Besetzung mit Gespür für Szenen, Menschen und Wirkung. Köln ist meine Basis, Einsätze gern auch darüber hinaus. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse und Partner von Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation aka Sanny4me aka Elternnotperfect 

#ChristianWeiße #AufStreife #AufStreifeDieNeuenEinsätze #Joyn #Sat1 #filmpool #Darsteller #Showreel #Schauspiel #Kleindarsteller #Komparse #TVProduktion #ScriptedReality #Storytelling #Kameraaffin

items.summary:
Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente 

In der Folge "Mein Auto, dein Auto" aus "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze" bin ich in einem der spannendsten Handlungsstränge des Formats zu sehen. Aus einem scheinbar harmlosen Moment beim Magnetangeln wird plötzlich eine hochexplosive Lage, genau diese Verdichtung aus Alltag, Zuspitzung und glaubwürdigem Spiel macht für mich den besonderen Reiz solcher Produktionen aus. 

Mein Dank geht an Joyn, Sat.1 und ganz besonders an filmpool für ein Format, das Tempo, Spannung und Publikumsnähe so wirkungsvoll verbindet. Solche Produktionen zeigen, wie wichtig jedes präzise gesetzte Bild, jede glaubwürdige Reaktion und jede stimmige Figur für die Gesamtwirkung einer Szene ist. 

Ich bringe in solche Einsätze nicht nur natürliche Präsenz vor der Kamera ein, sondern auch ein tiefes Verständnis für Bildwirkung, Timing, Atmosphäre und Produktionsabläufe. Genau diese Verbindung aus Darsteller, Content Creator, Produzent und Kameramensch macht mich für unterschiedlichste Formate interessant, ob TV, Werbung, Doku-Fiction, Social Ads oder fiktionale Stoffe mit realitätsnaher Tonalität. 

Wer für fiktive zukünftige Projekte einen verlässlichen, kameraaffinen und vielseitig einsetzbaren Darsteller sucht, findet in mir eine starke, professionelle und teamorientierte Besetzung mit Gespür für Szenen, Menschen und Wirkung. Köln ist meine Basis, Einsätze gern auch darüber hinaus. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse und Partner von Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation aka Sanny4me aka Elternnotperfect 

#ChristianWeiße #AufStreife #AufStreifeDieNeuenEinsätze #Joyn #Sat1 #filmpool #Darsteller #Showreel #Schauspiel #Kleindarsteller #Komparse #TVProduktion #ScriptedReality #Storytelling #Kameraaffin

items.text:
Die mobile „Ferrari Club Deutschland e.V. Hausband“ stellt sich vor ☝️
🟪 Kabellos Mobil Band 🟪

sharedPost.text:
Der Ferrari Club Deutschland

Im Juni 2010 lernten wir uns auf Sylt kennen!
Seit dem verbindet uns eine vertrauensvolle Beziehung und Zusammenarbeit. 
Ich bin stolz und glücklich so einen Kunden über so eine lange Zeit zu bedienen und denke es ist eine Art „Ritterschlag“,  der uns in unserer Szene auszeichnet. 

Da ist einfach dieses spezielle Vertrauen, dass man immer wieder in uns setzt. 

Nun waren wir wieder einmal mit den Ferraristi unterwegs. 

Um 16 Uhr starteten wir am Bootsanleger an Kameha Grand Hotel in Bonn auf einem Rheinschiff in Richtung Kölner Altstadt. 

Nach einem Fußweg von 1,4 km kamen wir im „Sünner im Walfisch“ an, wo wir den FERRARI CLUB bis um 23:00 Uhr bespielten. 

🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 hat gestern mit der neuen Besetzung, der überarbeiteten Song Auswahl und neuer energetischer Präsenz einen weiteren Meilenstein in Reihen des Ferrari Clubs Deutschland e.V. gesetzt. 

Solche Kunden fühlen, sehen und verstehen, dass man im Einsatz vor Ort MEHR als Musik bietet ☝️ 

Die Kritik und Empathie, die man 
🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 entgegen brachte, suchte seinesgleichen!

Solche Feedbacks sorgen bestimmt mit dafür, dass man nach 40 Jahren professionellem, musikalischen Status und fast 5000 gespielten Auftritten immer noch für seine Sache brennt, wie am ersten Tag 😍👍

#kabellosmobilband
#ferrariclubdeutschland
#galaband
#mobilemusik
#professionalmusicians

items.text:
Horror Web Series Casting Call in Thornton CO
CASTING CALL - Micro Vertical Found Footage Horror Web Series

Title: "CHAPTER 0"

Logline: A few weeks bedore a new horror escape room's grand opening, unusual experiences cause a paranoid employee to be concerned about the real-life maniac whose grisly murders inspired the game.

Genre: Found Footage Horror

Format: 10 (2-3 minutes each) vertical webisodes

Writer/Directors: Jerrod D. Brito (https://www.sharpspoonpictures.com/about-us.html) & Chris Guite

Executive Producer: Tim Carillo

Shooting Dates: A few flexible shooting nights between May 1st and May 30th

Locations: Thornton, CO

Roles:

RILEY (Lead)

Age: 18-22

Description: A new hire who doesn't enjoy horror, but took a Game Master job at a nearby escape room for the flexible hours and the ability to do homework there at night while waiting for deliveries in the weeks before the escape room opens. Riley is easily spooked, enjoys making vlogs, and though he/she/they isn't afraid of ghosts, nothing chills Riley more than real-life killers.

* These shorts will be roughly scripted, but in the spirit of found footage films, we are primarily looking for natural influencer-type personalities who are able to ad-lib when necessary.

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 3-4 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

ROBERT (Cameo)

Age: ???

Description: It could be a tall man in all black, lurking in the shadows, or it could just be our imaginations, our sleepless eyes playing tricks on us. Only our editor knows for sure...

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 2-3 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

AUDITION INFO: If you're interested in these roles, please send an email, headshot, resume, your desired fee, and any relevant reels or samples to jerrodbrito@gmail.com with the subject "CHAPTER 0" for consideration. Selected performers will be asked to submit a short video audition based on a prompt.

Thank you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Where You Came From

Genre: Comedy

Logline: Mauri is leaving for Africa... her mom isn't so sure about that...

Role: Frank. Between late forties and early sixties. Frank is a little bit of a mess, but he is Mauri's father through and through. He's supportive, unprofessional, and maybe a little hungover.

Production Company: This is a UCCS capstone film by Joseph Impellitteri with Christian Winkler and Onyx Riccelli producing

Production Type: Student Film

Contact Information: email me at jvitoimp@gmail.com or text me at 859-444-7502

Run Time: Short (~10 min)

Compensation: Paid ($25)

Union Status: Non-Union (not a hard line though)

Audition Information: Reach out to me; all auditions will be digital

Shooting Schedule: May 3rd, all day (12 hour shoot). Tentatively, 7 am-7 pm

Filming Location: Old North End in Colorado Springs (near downtown)

Project Description: I think the script is funny (bias). If you like comedy, message me!

topComments.text:
If you need an angsty teen anywhere in there… hit me up! 😂 
I have a 13yo who is ready to perform! 🙌🏽

job, business, product…

👉 game कहाँ बन रहा है
👉 control किसके पास है

याद रखो…
game खेलने वाले कभी जीतते हैं… कभी हारते हैं…
लेकिन…
game बनाने वाले हमेशा जीतते हैं। 🔥

🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM

1 Female Actor

2 Male Actors

Role: Father (Rich Look)
Preference: Theatre artists will be preferred.
Location: Delhi NCR
Only WhatsApp: 7505305964

items.text:
Get in touch ASAP!!! Looking for a male actor 18 - 22 year old for a new pilot being shot in June/July. Below is a description of what we’re looking for. Very important all points are met. 

- From London with an authentic London accent. 
- Mixed race (black and white) 
- Athletic build 
- Experience is ideal but not essential 
- NEEDS TO BE 18-22 years old. No exceptions!!!

Looking for this person urgently!!! If you fit the bill, comment below or drop me a DM and I can send you the official casting call etc.

items.text:
Hello everyone 🙂

CASTING CALL BLACK, ASIAN OR MIXED ACTRESS (VOICE OVER ROLE FOR VIDEO GAME)

I am currently casting for a narrative-driven VR project at Escape Studios titled Heavy is the Crown, and I am looking for a voice actress to portray the lead role of Lenore Vespen.

Lenore is a complex, emotionally layered character, and the performance is voice-over led, with a strong focus on internal monologue, subtlety, and psychological depth.

For this role, we are specifically seeking a Black, Asian or mixed-race actress, as the character is of African and Asian heritage.

I would love to invite any actress interested to submit a self-tape for the role. Please find attached the casting brief, which includes full details of the project and a monologue for audition.

This is a student industry project with a £100 honorarium, offering a strong, narrative-focused piece for showreel, as well as collaboration within a semi-professional production environment.

Self-tape deadline is set on April 30th and the recording session will take place on the week starting May 4th, the day will be set at the actress's convenience.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions—I’d be very happy to provide further information.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Don’t hesitate to share to any actress you think might fit the role I would really appreciate it,

Thanks,

Mary-Jane
Director

items.title: Hello everyone 🙂

items.text:
Casting Call for a student short film that I am filming next week. Relevant information is included as attached. 

If you have any questions, or if you are interested, please email me at Osworld.media@gmail.com and provide a headshot and/or small showreel, and I shall provide a copy of the script and discuss futher with you.

I am looking for a male and female aged 30+ to play the roles of the mother and father of my protagonist. The parents are featured in two scenes in the film, totalling to approximately 3-4 minutes of sceen time.

Please respond as soon as you can if you are interested, as filming will take place on either Sunday 12th April or Monday 13th April, depending on what is most convenient

Many thanks

items.text:
CASTING CALL – DOCUMENTARY FILM (LOS ANGELES)

Independent documentary film casting real people for an international festival project.

This film explores the experience of living “in between” — the phase between who you were and who you are trying to become. The project is built around themes of transformation, identity, dual life, and the emotional cost of pursuing a dream.

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR:
 • Actors, performers, and creatives based in Los Angeles
 • Age range: 25–80
 • All genders and backgrounds welcome

We are looking for individuals who are currently living in an “in-between” phase of life:
 • balancing artistic ambition with survival work
 • navigating uncertainty, reinvention, or long-term pursuit of a dream
 • experiencing a gap between expectation and reality

This is not about acting performance — we are looking for real stories, presence, and authenticity.

PROJECT DETAILS:
 • Independent festival-driven documentary film
 • The project already has press coverage, with further media exposure planned
 • Intended for international festival circuit and press distribution

COMPENSATION:

This is a paid project. Compensation will be discussed individually depending on participation and scope.

HOW TO APPLY:

Please send:
 • A short self-tape (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself
 • A brief description of your story

Include:
 • Name
 • Age range
 • Location
 • Current occupation

Email: casting@vorion.studio

NOTE:

This is a selective documentary project. Only selected participants will be contacted.
